g.text: On-demand skill routing, zero-standing context overhead, and SHA-256 byte verification
Input: exact candidate ID after ambiguous
Stdio / HTTP (Bearer Auth, CORS, Rate-limiting) • Injection & Secret Scan
• Fusion score: RRF(d) = Σ 1 / (60 + r_i(d)) → Shortlist (max 5)
• Optional Infinity Reranker applies match_score / match_margin policy
Calibrated via skillmux calibrate against synthetic/labeled query logs
Auto re-indexes on file change without server restart
